authors: Hwayong Shin Weidenbaum Center on the Economy
USAHwayong Shin is a postdoctoral fellow at Washington University in St. Louis
raw_title: Truth-Seeking vs. Balance: The Credibility Dilemma in Correcting Political Misinformation
title_en: Truth-Seeking vs. Balance: The Credibility Dilemma in Correcting Political Misinformation
title_zh: 追求真相与保持平衡：纠正政治错误信息中的可信度困境
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在纠正政治错误信息时面临的一个核心困境：是应该专注于追求真相，还是保持平衡的报道。研究发现，这两种不同的纠正方式会影响媒体或信息源的可信度，从而影响公众对信息的接受程度。
plain_summary_en: This research examines a core dilemma in correcting political misinformation: whether to focus on truth-seeking or maintain balanced reporting. The study finds that these different correction approaches affect the credibility of media or information sources, which in turn influences public acceptance of the information.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的错误信息纠正策略及其对媒体可信度和公众态度的影响研究
research_direction_en: Research on misinformation correction strategies in political communication and their effects on media credibility and public attitudes
